title: Icarus
body:
One moment…
turns into two.
Two…
turn into a story.
And a story—
becomes tragedy.

Or maybe… heartbreak.

Heartbreak
because the moments are no more.

But I smile…
I smile like Icarus when he fell,
because I was able to fly.
Fly through the moments of your love.
Fly through skies we thought were endless.
Every second we soared together—
a dream without end.

But like him,
I too return to the ground.

Now I sit
in a pool of scarlet emotions.
The love dwindles,
and in its place—
hatred grows.

A story we thought eternal…
cut short.
